text:
Market today: The mood is mixed, with some positive corporate news (Delta) overshadowed by growing concerns about AI spending. This AI sentiment is the real driver for your tech/chip heavy book.

Your holdings: SOXL is a major concern, down -24.38% and a leveraged product. SPAL, another new leveraged ETF, is also down -20.64%. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any further news or analyst commentary regarding AI spending trends. Also, monitor your leveraged positions for continued decay or deeper drawdowns.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing risk in your highly concentrated, leveraged positions amidst evolving AI sector sentiment.
plays: Consider trimming SOXL given its "SELL" status and -24.38% drawdown; it's a leveraged product on margin.
Review SPAL, a new leveraged ETF already down -20.64%, to assess if its risk profile still aligns with your strategy.
No new buys today – hold and watch for clearer signals, especially with AI spending concerns looming.
